# alpakasoelde Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2025-11-24

## Active Technologies

- Astro 5.14 (TypeScript 5) for the dashboard UI; C# 12 on .NET 10.0 isolated Azure Functions for backend slices + Astro core runtime, Azure Storage Blobs SDK 12.26, Azure Data Tables SDK 12.11, Azure Functions Worker 2.51, HttpMultipartParser for multi-part bodies (001-event-document-upload)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

Astro 5.14 (TypeScript 5) for the dashboard UI; C# 12 on .NET 10.0 isolated Azure Functions for backend slices: Follow standard conventions
